# ANALYSIS: Leaderboard Staleness Audit

**Filed:** 2026-06-15  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** analysis  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Methodology

Reviewed the leaderboard in `strategy/candidates/_LEADERBOARD.md` for candidates with status `PROMISING` (ready for J review) or `RATIFICATION_READY` (explicitly awaiting ratification). For each such candidate, cross-checked the candidate file description against the leaderboard notes to determine whether the associated watcher/filter code is already live in the watcher or heartbeat codebase (per OP-22 engine-benefit or integration spec findings). A candidate is considered "live" if the leaderboard explicitly states that watcher/heartbeat code has been shipped, deployed, or updated (e.g., "Watcher updated", "GATE DEPLOYED", "INTEGRATION SPEC FILED + WATCH-ONLY branch added").

## Findings

| Rank | Candidate | Status | Watcher/Filter Code Live? | Evidence from Leaderboard | Mismatch? |
|------|-----------|--------|----------------------------|---------------------------|-----------|
| 3 | V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE | PROMISING | **Yes** | "Watcher updated 2026-05-21 (OP-22 engine-benefit): `V14E_DIRECTION_FILTER = \"bear\"` constant added to `v14_enhanced_watcher.py` — watcher now accumulates bear-only observations going forward. Gym: 65/65 PASS confirmed post-edit. Live engine (heartbeat.md) unaffected — watcher-only change." | No — status `PROMISING` appropriately reflects accumulation of new observations (OP-21 gate: WR ≥ 55% over N≥100 new bear-only observations) pending ratification. |
| 4 | ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE | PROMISING — GATE DEPLOYED + INTEGRATION SPEC FILED | **Yes** | "GATE DEPLOYED + INTEGRATION SPEC FILED (2026-05-24). Blocked: OP-21 0/3 live J wins." | No — status `PROMISING` correctly indicates awaiting OP-21 live-win threshold despite gate deployment. |
| 22 | RIBBON_MOMENTUM_GATE | RATIFICATION_READY | **No** | Description notes: "WF PASS (ratio=3.74) + real-fills PASS." No mention of watcher/heartbeat code deployment, integration spec, or watcher-only update. The entry characterizes it as an "Entry filter — 3 visual conditions" requiring changes to filters.py/heartbeat.md, but leaderboard contains no deployment confirmation. | No — status `RATIFICATION_READY` aligns with code not yet live; awaiting J ratification before implementation. |
| 19 | FBW_MORNING_MID | WATCH-ONLY + INTEGRATION SPEC FILED | **Partial (logging only)** | "INTEGRATION SPEC FILED (2026-05-24): FBW WATCH-ONLY branch added to heartbeat.md. Logs FBW_WOULD_ENTER to decisions.jsonl on qualifying signals. Uncomment execution block after J ratification." | No — status `WATCH-ONLY` correctly reflects observation-only mode; execution block remains commented pending ratification. |

## Conclusion

All candidates with status `PROMISING` or `RATIFICATION_READY` have watcher/filter code live status consistent with their leaderboard annotations. No instances were found where watcher/filter code is already live while the status remains at `PROMISING` or `RATIFICATION_READY` without justification (e.g., pending OP-21 live-win thresholds or explicit integration specs). The leaderboard accurately reflects the maturation state of each candidate relative to code deployment.

No file updates to `strategy/candidates/_LEADERBOARD.md` are warranted at this time.  

---  
**Pre-merge gate:** None required for this audit.  
**Confidence:** 9/10 — Leaderboard descriptions provide sufficient evidence to verify code-live status; no ambiguous cases detected.  
**Pre-existing leaderboard impact:** N/A (pure analysis, no candidate modification).
